description_long: This is a robust, rectangular counter constructed primarily from dark, textured wood, giving it a heavy and industrial appearance. The front features a recessed workspace with a raised back panel that houses a metallic display screen and a control panel with several buttons and switches. The sides are thick and solid, with visible wood grain and a slightly rough finish, while the back is plain and unadorned. The workspace area is set back from the front edge, creating a sheltered nook for interaction. The control panel and display suggest this counter could serve as a security or information desk in an urban environment. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and function.
description: A heavy, dark wood counter with a recessed workspace, metallic display, and control panel, designed for urban utility. The surface is textured and industrial, with a robust, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed workspace, metallic display, and control panel with buttons and switches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, textured wood and partial view of the control panel and display.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid wood back with no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible wood grain and partial view of the workspace and controls.
attribute_button_layout: cluster of rectangular and square buttons in a grid pattern
